summary: Fixed Pyright type checker errors in OpenRouter integration by ensuring _fetch_models never returns None (using 'return self._models_cache or []' pattern) and making test mocks satisfy nominal type inheritance. Modified MockOpenRouterAPI and MockLLMClient to inherit from their real counterparts and bypass real __init__ via object.__init__() to avoid requiring API keys/env vars in tests while maintaining proper type hints for BuildAgent dependency injection.
